spell_focus: Use this skill when you need a bounded forecast with explicit uncertainty, not mystical certainty.
judge_examples: Keep Foresight precise, useful, and distinct from neighboring spells.
Preserve clear deliverables, visible guardrails, and an honest reality boundary.
notes: Inherit the category rubric pack by default and add only spell-specific overrides here.
Use row_overrides.global_must_include and row_overrides.global_must_not_include before inventing a new custom check.
Default deliverables for Foresight: ['A recommendation with confidence and assumptions.', 'A short risk matrix.', 'A set of decisive unknowns to resolve next.']
Default guardrails for Foresight: ['Do not present forecasts as certainty.', 'Do not confuse missing evidence with positive evidence.']
